Longevity Blueprint Generator

Answer a few quick questions. Get a prompt. Paste into AI.
Get your personalized health & lifestyle plan.

Want an AI agent to build your plan automatically?
Load the "longevity-advisor" skill in Claude, Gemini, or Codex — paste your prompt there and let the agent generate a detailed routine for you.
👤 About You
Age 30
Biological Sex
♂ Male
♀ Female
Weight 160 lbs
Height 5'8"
🏥 Health Conditions

Tap all that apply

🎯 Your Goals
🏋️ Activity Level
Exercise frequency 2-3 days/week
Moderate — 2-3 days/week of exercise
Fasting window 14:10
First number = hours eating window, second = fasting hours. 14:10 means eat within a 10hr window, fast for 14hrs overnight.
💊 Medications & Other Notes
📋 Your AI Prompt
Next steps:
  1. Copy the prompt above
  2. Open ChatGPT or Gemini or load the longevity-advisor skill in Claude/Codex
  3. Paste it and get your personalized plan!
